description: CompositionWhite hooded sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, hood with drawstring, patch pocket on the waist with double-sided opening, AFC lettering and club seal on the chest, swoosh logo embroidered on the left sleeve and has a ribbed hemlineFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowWarm iron onlyDo not dry cleanDo not iron on print or embroideryGet ready for the winters in style in this T90 football training jacket from nike. The simple style is complemented by the bold club seam and club initials paying homage to the victories of Arsenal, while the thick fabric provides lightweight comfort and warmth. Team this with long-sleeved tees, jeans or tracks and sports shoes.
